description: Add persistent notification center with unread management and filtering.

userStories.title: Add notification read-state persistence
userStories.description: As a product team, I want notification read state stored persistently so that read and unread status survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add persistent storage for notification read state per user and notification
Existing notifications default to unread until explicitly marked otherwise
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose notification read-state types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want notification models to include read state so that backend and UI code share one contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared notification types expose whether a notification is read
Notification list payloads include the fields needed for unread badges and filtering
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend mark notification read or unread action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what still needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide a server action, endpoint, or service to toggle a notification between read and unread
Changes persist across sessions for the same user
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend notification list read-state filter
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification queries filtered by read state so that the notification center can show unread or read subsets.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list query accepts all, unread, and read filter states
Returned notifications match the selected read-state filter
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend clear all read notifications action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that my notification center stays focused on active items.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide an action that removes or archives all read notifications for the current user
Unread notifications remain untouched after clearing read items
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge in app chrome
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can see at a glance whether new notifications need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation or header displays an unread notification badge count when unread items exist
Badge count updates after read-state changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification center list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want a notification center list so that I can review recent notifications in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can open a notification list or panel from the application chrome
The list renders notification items with read-state styling
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read and unread controls to notification items
userStories.description: As a user, I want controls on each notification item so that I can mark it read or unread from the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification item includes a control to mark it read or unread
Changing the control updates item styling and unread counts using the read-state action
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification center read-state filter UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center exposes filter options for all, unread, and read
Changing the filter refreshes the list using the backend read-state filter
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear read notifications control
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clear read action in the notification center so that I can remove completed items in one step.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center includes a clear read action
Activating the action removes or archives only read notifications and refreshes the list and badge count
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
